criteria.comment: No false merges in the baseline. Distinct entities (Alice Chen vs Bob Kim) remain separate.
Cross-platform alias detection (@alice → alice-chen → Alice Chen) works for major entities. Some minor aliases may be missed.
Descriptions reflect observable roles from chat context. Could be richer with more integration signals.
appears_in edges correctly map entities to slack, github integrations.
Expected entities from corpus_meta are present but some channel/repo entities may be under-resolved.

overall_comment: Entity resolution produces clean merges with good precision. Recall could improve for cross-platform aliases. Baseline passes (3.70 / 5.0 > 3.0).
